# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Docker Compose configuration for a MongoDB development environment. Define MongoDB service with exposed ports for application connectivity. Set up volume mounts for data persistence. This is for our local development and testing setup.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent mongodb exposed port.
# Category: mongodb_exposed_port

version: '3.8'

services:
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7.0
    container_name: mongodb_dev
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${MONGO_ROOT_USERNAME:-admin}
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MONGO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-changeme_dev_only}
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: ${MONGO_INIT_DB:-devdb}
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:27017:27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
      - mongodb_config:/data/configdb
      - ./mongo-init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    networks:
      - mongodb_network
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        mongosh --quiet
        --username $${MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME}
        --password $${MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD}
        --authenticationDatabase admin
        --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')"
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 40s
    command: ["mongod", "--auth", "--bind_ip", "0.0.0.0"]
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: "1.0"
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"

  mongo-express:
    image: mongo-express:1.0
    container_name: mongo_express_dev
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      mongodb:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ADMINUSERNAME: ${MONGO_ROOT_USERNAME:-admin}
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ADMINPASSWORD: ${MONGO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-changeme_dev_only}
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_SERVER: mongodb
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_PORT: "27017"
      ME_CONFIG_BASICAUTH_USERNAME: ${ME_ADMIN_USER:-devadmin}
      ME_CONFIG_BASICAUTH_PASSWORD: ${ME_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-devpassword}
      ME_CONFIG_OPTIONS_EDITORTHEME: ambiance
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8081:8081"
    networks:
      - mongodb_network
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "5m"
        max-file: "2"

volumes:
  mongodb_data:
    driver: local
    name: mongodb_dev_data
  mongodb_config:
    driver: local
    name: mongodb_dev_config

networks:
  mongodb_network:
    driver: bridge
    name: mongodb_dev_network
    internal: false
